name: Tachyon

runner.notes: Prepare a run worktree, launch Tachyon against it, provide prompt.md exactly, then run harness verification.

public_stack_signals: Owned reference profile; public product/source URLs are intentionally not asserted in this benchmark repo yet.
Benchmark-relevant capabilities are tracked as owned assumptions until public product documentation is available.
setup_notes: Fill homepage and source_url when the public product surface is ready.
Edit docs/product/capabilities.json first, then run scripts/product/sync-tachyon-profile.py.

sources.notes: Owned canonical product surface (docs/product): overview, capabilities, architecture, workflows, limits, and capabilities.json SSOT.
Benchmark repository holding the owned reference profile and harness; public Tachyon product homepage/source are not asserted here.

research.positioning: Owned reference ADE for audited multi-agent development, reproducible task worktrees, evidence capture, and verification-first handoff.

unknowns: Do not publish private implementation details from Tachyon in this public benchmark repo.
Replace owned/internal stack notes with public docs when available.

infrastructure: Runs benchmark tasks from prepared worktrees.
Uses isolated agent workspaces and evidence/handoff primitives in the owned product flow.
Verification is treated as a gate before accepting delivered work.

workspace_isolation: explicit owned path boundaries for delegated work
remote_mobile: not claimed in public competitor profile

parity_risks: Owned product knowledge can bias prompts or manual intervention; keep prompts identical and record intervention counts.
Public report should avoid private implementation claims until Tachyon publishes matching docs.
Use this as a reference profile, not a sourced public competitor profile.

hypotheses: Auditable agent operations and verification-first delivery can be a durable differentiator.
Worktree isolation plus evidence/handoff makes multi-agent output easier to trust.
Plugin and host-action governance can support safer local automation.
evidence: Owned product workflow uses task verification and handoff/evidence records as operating primitives.
Benchmark suite is designed around reproducible worktrees and independent verifiers.
unknowns: Publicly citable Tachyon docs, source, product homepage, and pricing are not yet represented here.
